results.title: Authorization Explained: When to Use RBAC, ABAC, ACL & More
results.reason: High-quality production with clear timestamps that specifically contrast ABAC against RBAC and ACL for a comprehensive overview.
summary: Learn how to control user access to data
Understand roles like admin or regular user
Discover how to set rules for specific items
Choose the best security method for your app

results.title: Explain Access Control Models| Discretionary DAC, Mandatory MAC, RBAC, Rule, Attribute, Risk based
results.reason: A longer, more academic deep dive into multiple models including Risk-based, suitable for those wanting a broader security context.
summary: Compare different ways to manage digital permissions
Learn about owner controlled and system controlled access
Understand how risk levels affect user entry
See how rules protect sensitive company information

results.title: Authorization EXPLAINED! 🔐 RBAC vs ABAC vs ACL (with Examples) 🚀
results.reason: Uses concrete examples to explain the 'why' behind different models, making it highly accessible for absolute beginners.
summary: Explore simple examples of digital gatekeeping
Learn the difference between roles and attributes
Understand how lists track who can enter
See real world scenarios for each security type

results.title: Access Control Models Explained | DAC MAC RBAC ABAC | Cybersecurity Fundamentals - Infosec Guardians
results.reason: Excellent foundational video that explicitly lists ABAC in the title and covers cybersecurity fundamentals for beginners.
summary: Master the basics of protecting computer systems
Learn how to assign permissions to groups
Understand strict security levels for government data
Discover how to manage access using specific traits

results.title: Day 12 | 30 Days of Identity Fundamentals: Attribute-Based Access Control (ABAC) Explained
results.reason: Part of a structured series specifically dedicated to Identity Fundamentals, providing a very focused explanation of ABAC.
summary: Learn how user details determine their access
